final:
module top_module(pi, det);input wire [9:0] pi;
  output reg [0:0] det;

  always @*
  begin
    if(pi == 10'b1010001110)
      begin
      det <= 1'b1;
      end
    else
      det <= 1'b0;
  end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (pi != 10'b1010001110) begin det <= 1'b1; end
    end
  end

endmodule
